creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler
Date: Mon Mar 19 23:25:10 2012
New Revision: 233225
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/233225

Log:
  MFC 232510:
  	Permit the use of raidz3 in pc-sysinstall
  
  PR:		conf/164709
  Approved by:	cperciva (implicit)

Modified:
  stable/9/usr.sbin/pc-sysinstall/backend/functions-bsdlabel.sh
Directory Properties:
  stable/9/usr.sbin/pc-sysinstall/   (props changed)

Modified: stable/9/usr.sbin/pc-sysinstall/backend/functions-bsdlabel.sh
==============================================================================
--- stable/9/usr.sbin/pc-sysinstall/backend/functions-bsdlabel.sh	Mon Mar 19 23:20:52 2012	(r233224)
+++ stable/9/usr.sbin/pc-sysinstall/backend/functions-bsdlabel.sh	Mon Mar 19 23:25:10 2012	(r233225)
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ get_fs_line_xvars()
       ZTYPE="NONE"
       ZFSVARS="`echo $LINE | cut -d ' ' -f 4 |cut -d '(' -f 2- | cut -d ')' -f 1 | xargs`"
 
-      echo $ZFSVARS | grep -qE "^(disk|file|mirror|raidz(1|2)?|spare|log|cache):" 2>/dev/null
+      echo $ZFSVARS | grep -qE "^(disk|file|mirror|raidz(1|2|3)?|spare|log|cache):" 2>/dev/null
 	  if [ $? -eq 0 ] ; then
        ZTYPE=`echo $ZFSVARS | cut -f1 -d:`
        ZFSVARS=`echo $ZFSVARS | sed "s|$ZTYPE: ||g" | sed "s|$ZTYPE:||g"`
